items.title: Manchester United's Casemiro Says Neymar Would Accept Bench Role For World Cup
items.summary: Manchester United midfielder Casemiro has thrown his weight behind Neymar making Brazil's 2026 World Cup squad, suggesting the forward is willing to sacrifice his starting spot...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Has 'diamond' Shankland delivered his biggest moment for Hearts?
items.summary: Lawrence Shankland is hailed as a "diamond of a player" after his superb winning goal against Rangers moved Hearts a step closer to a historic league title.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Robinson in contact with England as he eyes Test recall
items.summary: Bowler Ollie Robinson confirms he has been in contact with both England head coach Brendon McCullum and managing director Rob Key as he eyes a recall to the Test side.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
